title: Multiplayer Bosses
description: A server-side mod that makes boss health and loot drops scales to player count.
body:
## A server-side mod that makes boss health and loot drops scales to player count. 

Default behavior makes bosses drop Loot Bags per player

### The current config option are as follows: 
- Should Scale Boss Health
- Should Scale Boss Drops
- Health Multiplier Per Player
- Flat Health Multiplier - Overides Health Multiplier if not 0
- Flat Drop Multiplier - Overides default player count scaling if not 0
- Should Use Loader Tags
- Should Drop Loot Bags
- Boss Entities - List of bosses to use
- Loot Bag Tints - Colors of dropped loot bags
- Use Proximity Scaling - Only count players near boss spawns
- Proximity Scaling Range - Block distance to count players in a boss fight

I am working on a Fabric and Forge version.

*Note: Vanilla minecraft health values cannot exceed 1024. To bypass this you can use this mod [AttributeFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix)
